evidence.text: Inventory artifacts: Body/S/S0/portal-core/contract-inventory/{README.md, track-01-baseline.json (machine-readable inventory: portal-core types, MathemeHarmonicProfile field-by-field readiness/privacy/owner, C pointer_web symbols, epi-cli contract tests, TS zod schemas, envelope refs), baseline-profile.json (180-line public-current fixture generated by real portal_core::MathemeHarmonicProfile::from_tick(kernel_tick_from_epogdoon(0,0)))}. Generator + drift-guard test at Body/S/S0/portal-core/tests/track_01_t0_baseline_fixture.rs asserts privacy_class=PublicCurrentContext, vak_address=None, no protected-local fields (natalChartHandle/qPersonal/identityHash/elementalBalance/naraBody/journalBody). Verification PASS: cargo test --manifest-path Body/S/S0/portal-core/Cargo.toml → 79/79 (10 suites incl. new baseline fixture); cargo test --manifest-path Body/S/S0/epi-cli/Cargo.toml --test pointer_web_ffi_contract → 4/4 (also serves as C pointer-web wrapper via Rust FFI); --test kernel_api_envelope_contract → 1/1. 7 readiness blockers carried forward (IOD-04 binary/mahamaya versioning, IOD-05 S2 # root, S2/S3 pointer_anchor finalization, DCC-05 audio/cymatic ownership, DSD-04 SpaceTimeDB schema source, IOD-03 world_clock authority, PRD-03 kernel-bridge host).

Deliverable 1 (stable C contracts): HC_BedrockWeb7/PointerWeb36/ContextFrameWeb7 already declared in Body/S/S0/epi-lib/include/pointer_web.h and exercised by native make test_pointer_web — 8/8 pass (keeps_hot_coordinate_128_bytes, bedrock_web_exposes_hash_and_six_raw_psychoids, bedrock_web_declares_kernel_successor_and_inversion_law, family_ring_six_plus_six_prime, position_ring_separates_inversion_mirror_tick_return, lens_ring_exposes_twelve_lens_anchors, context_frame_overlay_sevenfold_and_diatonic, harmonic_helpers_match_ql_math). Deliverable 2 (sizeof==128): _Static_assert in Body/S/S0/epi-lib/test/pillar1/test_pillar1_gaps.c (compile-time) + runtime asserts in test_struct.c and test_pointer_web.c; make test_pillar1 runs 110/110. Deliverable 3 (FFI exposes Bedrock7/PointerWeb36/CF7 without re-deriving): existing Body/S/S0/epi-cli/src/ffi/mod.rs already mirrors all three structs and fill functions; pointer_web_ffi_contract.rs 4/4 confirms through statically linked libepilogos. Deliverable 4 (stable enum/string mapping boundary): NEW Body/S/S0/epi-cli/src/ffi/role_names.rs + Body/S/S0/epi-cli/tests/ffi_role_name_contract.rs (9/9) — relation_role_name/interval_role_name/ratio_role_name/bedrock_role_name/helix_name/pointer_ring_name/context_frame_notation, locked against canonical strings extracted from Body/S/S0/epi-cli/schemas/src/coordinate.ts zod enums (HCRelationRole/HCIntervalRole/HCRatioRole/HCBedrockRole/HCHelix/HCPointerRing + 7 CF labels), plus publicly_exported + pointer_web36 12+12+12=36+CF7 layout invariants. portal-core 79/79 (no regression). NO mocked/string-only test paths.

Implemented versioned public-current portal-core::MathemeHarmonicProfile schema v1: profileSchemaVersion/profileProvenance/tickAddress, binary+mahamaya compatibility aliases, nullable s2Anchor/s3Anchor, and preserved public-current privacy boundaries. Added real constructor/projection tests in track_01_t2_profile_contract covering required bridge fields, 12 tick states, bimba/pratibimba + X/X' mirror invariants, pointer web 36 cardinality, CF7 projection, binary/mahamaya equality, no protected-local leakage, 472 codon surface, 24 dual x8 + 40 non-dual x7, 84 forward/reverse mappings, and qCosmic normalization. Regenerated baseline-profile.json via BASELINE_FIXTURE_BLESS=1 from real MathemeHarmonicProfile::from_tick. Updated S0 contract inventory and gateway expectations to canonical provisional-gap transcription state plus schema/alias assertions. Verification PASS: cargo test --manifest-path Body/S/S0/portal-core/Cargo.toml; cargo test --manifest-path Body/S/S0/epi-cli/Cargo.toml --test pointer_web_ffi_contract; --test kernel_api_envelope_contract; --test gate_temporal_context (2 passed, 1 live Redis ignored); --test gate_epii_agent_access (8 passed, 1 live Graphiti ignored).

New 'epi profile' CLI cluster lands at Body/S/S0/epi-cli/src/profile/mod.rs with four real-code-backed subcommands: 'epi profile show --cycle N --sub-tick N' emits the full MathemeHarmonicProfile JSON via portal_core::MathemeHarmonicProfile::from_tick (no handwritten fixture); 'epi profile pointer' emits pointer_anchor + context_frames + roleDictionaries (canonical TS-zod label sets for pointerRings/helices/relationRoles/intervalRoles/ratioRoles/bedrockRoles/contextFrameNotations) + webCardinality=36; 'epi profile codon --lens N --mode N' calls portal_core::codon_rotation_from_lens_mode with proper Option-based error reporting; 'epi profile readiness [--probe] [--gateway-url URL]' implements the 9-state bridge-readiness taxonomy mirroring 07.T0 (BridgeUnavailable / ProfileMissingField / S2GraphBlocked / S3SubscriptionBlocked / S5ReviewBlocked / AuthorityPayloadMissing / PrivacyBlocked / DegradedButReadable / ReadyPublicCurrent) with severity classifier (ok/degraded/blocked) and dimensional-axis enumeration. TCP-based gateway probe (deliberately not reqwest::blocking — avoids tokio runtime conflict in tests) reports DegradedButReadable on TCP-reachable gateway, BridgeUnavailable on unreachable/refused — honest failure surfacing, no mock-success branch. main.rs wires Commands::Profile { cmd } to profile::run(&cmd) printing pretty-JSON; new top-level 'epi profile' alongside core/vault/graph/gate/agent. TS schema mirror at Body/S/S0/epi-cli/schemas/src/readiness.ts with zod BridgeReadinessState + BridgeReadinessSeverity + BridgeReadinessSnapshot + DIMENSIONAL_READINESS_STATES, exported from index.ts. Verification PASS: cargo test --lib profile (10/10 unit tests covering taxonomy, severity, dimensional, role_dictionaries, run dispatcher for all four subcommands); cargo test --test profile_cli_contract (6/6 integration tests spawn the real epi binary via CARGO_BIN_EXE_epi and assert show source/canonical fields/no protected-local leak, pointer 36+7+canonical dicts, codon portal-core source, readiness no-probe and unreachable both report bridge_unavailable honestly, taxonomy coverage); pointer_web_ffi_contract 4/4 + kernel_api_envelope_contract 1/1 + ffi_role_name_contract 9/9 all still green; epi-cli lib suite 224/224. Carry-forward: actual HTTP/contract verification for the gateway deferred to Track 04 T6 (this T3 reports honest TCP reachability only); gateway-facing profile methods continue to use existing S3 ownership (no parallel session authority created inside S0).

Implemented SpaceTimeDB projection/resync bridge: shared S3 SpacetimeProjectionPlan now has lite/full subscription profiles and generated SubscribeMulti queries; S0 bridge readiness exposes capabilityFacts plus lite/full table sets; native WebSocket subscriptions now return typed projection updates with connected/connection-lost/reconnecting/stale-profile/resynced-profile-generation/degraded-but-subscribable semantics while preserving next_context compatibility and HTTP SQL fallback. Verification: cargo test --offline --manifest-path Body/S/S0/epi-cli/Cargo.toml --test gate_spacetimedb_bridge (10/10 pass with real local reducer HTTP and WebSocket subscription harness); cargo test --offline --manifest-path Body/S/S3/gateway-contract/Cargo.toml (13 unit + 3 integration pass); cargo test --offline --manifest-path Body/S/S0/epi-cli/Cargo.toml --test gate_temporal_context (2 pass, 1 ignored live Redis). GitNexus impact attempted but blocked by local @ladybugdb native module arch mismatch (arm64 module under x86_64 Node), so blast radius was constrained by targeted contract tests.

Added shared @epi-logos/ql-schema kernel-bridge contract schemas for profile, readiness, connection status, event taxonomy, capability names, subscription mode/profile, and RPC envelopes; strict real MathemeHarmonicProfile fixture parsing rejects renderer-local fields and RPC validation rejects unauthorized methods/private payload keys. Preserved bimbaCoordinate identity contract and family-as-property parsing, not family node labels. Verification: npm --prefix Body/S/S0/epi-cli/schemas test (79/79 pass); npm --prefix Body/S/S0/epi-cli/schemas run build (tsc pass); node dist import smoke parsed real baseline profile and readReadiness RPC envelope; pnpm --dir Idea/Pratibimba/System test:contracts (21/21 pass). GitNexus impact attempted with npx gitnexus impact MathemeHarmonicProfile but blocked by @ladybugdb/core native module architecture mismatch: have arm64, need x86_64.

Inventory at Body/S/S2/graph-schema/contract-inventory/track-02-authority-drift.json: schema versions (SCHEMA_VERSION 2026-05-17-s2-bimba-coord-driven-3072, EMBEDDING_VERSION q-semantic-v2-3072, Q_SCHEMA_VERSION q-prefix-v2), 17 registered relationship types vs 11 seed-emitted (drift: GENERATES/ENTANGLES/INTERLEAVES/MANIFESTS/BEDROCK/FAMILY_CONTAINS/MOBIUS_RETURN/ANCHORED_TO seed-only), expected node count 102 / rel count 306, 7 dataset branches under docs/datasets, docker-compose.epi-s2.yml topology (neo4j+apoc, redis-stack, graphiti; n10s/GDS missing), live env vars (EPILOGOS_NEO4J_URI/USER/PASSWORD + EPILOGOS_SEMANTIC_CACHE_REDIS_URL/NAMESPACE/NAME/SCRIPT), 7 M-prime + M5-3 + M5-4 downstream consumer hooks, 8 carried-forward blockers (IOD-05/06/07/08, seed-registry drift, bimba-mcp divergence, destructive-rebuild policy, DSD-05). Verification PASS: cargo test graph-schema 13/13 + sub-suites all green; graph-services 68/68 main + sub-suites green (5 live-gated tests ignored without EPI_GRAPH_LIVE=1 as designed); epi graph doctor --json reports neo4j+redis+redisStack connected, semanticCache blocked with explicit reason 'redisvl not installed' (honest blocked-state semantic per plan).

Schema and relation-law convergence applied to Body/S/S2/graph-schema/src/lib.rs: 8 seed-emitted structural relations added as canonical entries (GENERATES/ENTANGLES/INTERLEAVES with coordinate_home=C0 source_family=seed-topology; MANIFESTS/BEDROCK/FAMILY_CONTAINS/MOBIUS_RETURN with coordinate_home=M source_family=seed-topology; ANCHORED_TO with coordinate_home=CF) — RELATIONSHIP_TYPE_SPECS now 17->25, all compatibility=false. Deep-dataset relation convention recognized via NEW is_deep_dataset_relation_type() + classify_relationship_type() returning RelationshipTypeClass{Canonical,Compatibility,DeepDataset,Drift} — pattern (uppercase ASCII + digits + underscores, starts uppercase, no consecutive/trailing underscores) — covers the ~thousands of relation types in docs/datasets/{anuttara,paramasiva,parashakti,mahamaya,nara,epii}-deep/relations.json without per-instance registration. Two Anuttara fields added as canonical C1 node specs: c_1_symbol + c_1_formulation_type (Public disclosure, source_family=anuttara-language). NEW Body/S/S2/graph-schema/tests/track_02_t1_convergence.rs (5 tests) locks: every seed-emitted topology relation is canonical; deep-dataset samples (ARCHETYPAL_RESONANCE_*, MIRRORS_SVATANTRYA, ABHINAVAGUPTA_RESONANCE_07, ACHIEVES_SIVA_SHAKTI_UNITY) classify correctly; registered/lowercase/malformed strings do NOT capture; Anuttara c_1_symbol/c_1_formulation_type/c_1_complete_formulation are Public C1 nodes; AdHocRelation and relates_to classify as Drift. Verification: cargo test graph-schema 13+suites all green (including new 5/5); graph-services 68+sub-suites green (5 live-gated tests ignored without EPI_GRAPH_LIVE). validate_node_properties + validate_relationship_properties pass (existing tests). Carry-forward: live db.relationshipTypes() vs registry assertion deferred to T2 (needs running Neo4j harness); GDS overlay provenance field set deferred to T6 (n10s/GDS packaging IOD-07 unresolved); Anuttara field name vs c_*-prefix open decision still tracked as IOD-06.
Parked by user request to switch to ready Track 01 T2; existing S2 worktree changes preserved for later resume.

Resume verification completed without new S2 edits. Required 02.T1 context pack regenerated/read; implementation search confirmed schema registry covers seed-emitted GENERATES/ENTANGLES/INTERLEAVES/MANIFESTS/BEDROCK/FAMILY_CONTAINS/MOBIUS_RETURN/ANCHORED_TO, deep-dataset relation classifier, and Anuttara c_1_symbol/c_1_formulation_type/c_1_complete_formulation property specs. Verification PASS: cargo test --manifest-path Body/S/S2/graph-schema/Cargo.toml (all graph-schema unit/integration/doc tests green, including track_02_t1_convergence 5/5); cargo test --manifest-path Body/S/S2/graph-services/Cargo.toml (all non-live graph-services suites green; live embeddings/link/Neo4j tests ignored by existing runtime gates). No mock-only proof used.

Implemented S2 graph doctor plugin-readiness topology: DoctorReport now emits separate schema, apoc, n10s, owl2Rl, gds, and privacyProjection readiness sections; APOC/n10s/GDS/OWL checks use live Neo4j SHOW PROCEDURES queries and blocked fallback states instead of stubbed procedure lists; privacyProjection reports Option 1 public-coordinate overlay readiness and excludes Graphiti/Nara protected labels. Added Body/S/S2/RUNBOOK.md and graph-services contract test doctor_plugin_readiness_contract. Verification PASS: cargo test --manifest-path Body/S/S2/graph-services/Cargo.toml (all non-live suites pass; existing live Neo4j/LLM tests remain ignored by explicit gates); cargo test --manifest-path Body/S/S0/epi-cli/Cargo.toml --test graph_commands doctor_json_reports_graph_and_semantic_sections; cargo run --manifest-path Body/S/S0/epi-cli/Cargo.toml -- --json graph doctor emitted apoc ready with procedureCount=190, n10s blocked procedureCount=0, owl2Rl blocked on n10s, gds blocked procedureCount=0, privacyProjection blocked on gds, and schema blocked on existing local graph drift unrecognized coordinate Family_C.

Follow-up fix after live doctor surfaced stale local graph assumptions: semantic stale-node scanning now skips non-kernel family/meta coordinates such as Family_C (family facts remain properties/meta nodes, not semantic kernel anchors) and serializes q_* list properties safely before hashing semantic documents. Verification PASS: cargo test --manifest-path Body/S/S2/graph-services/Cargo.toml semantic_stale_scan_skips_family_meta_coordinates; cargo run --manifest-path Body/S/S0/epi-cli/Cargo.toml -- --json graph doctor now reports schema.ok=true and graph.ok=true with no Family_C or q-list TypeError; remaining degraded sections are honest environment readiness (n10s/gds/privacyProjection blocked, semanticCache missing redisvl).

Implemented canonical S2 seed baseline helpers and tests: seed_baseline_coordinates() covers 102 seed nodes, seed_relationship_types() covers canonical relation types, and seed_baseline_snapshot_queries() exposes node-count, relationship-count, and M0/M1/M5 smoke queries. Fixed s2'.coordinate.resolve behavior so bare # remains the root node while numbered legacy #N inputs still resolve to MN (verified #4 -> M4). Updated VAK seed label to registered VakCoordinate and idempotently removes stale Vak from the six VAK seed nodes; family identity remains in c_4_family properties, not family-specific labels. Verification: cargo test --offline --manifest-path Body/S/S2/graph-services/Cargo.toml; cargo test --offline --manifest-path Body/S/S2/graph-services/Cargo.toml --test seed_contract live_seed_baseline_is_idempotent_and_queryable_by_coordinate_api -- --ignored --nocapture against live Neo4j; cargo test --offline --manifest-path Body/S/S2/graph-services/Cargo.toml --test graph_api_contract live_graph_methods_write_read_traverse_and_cleanup_test_owned_data -- --ignored --nocapture; cargo test --offline --manifest-path Body/S/S0/epi-cli/Cargo.toml --test graph_commands; live epi graph doctor shows Neo4j/schema/APOC/Redis/Redis Stack ready with n10s/GDS/RedisVL honestly blocked; live sample Cypher returned relations for #, M0, M2, M4, M5, CF_FRACTAL, CPF and stale Vak label count 0.

Implemented dataset population hardening for real docs/datasets corpus: DatasetImporter now applies low-detail labels during import_all, records deterministic imported node/relation names plus skipped node/relation reasons, treats missing write confirmations and missing graph endpoints as skips instead of false successes, and overwrites c_3_dataset_branch/c_3_dataset_branch_label with the active branch so deep branch provenance is visible after low-detail preloading. Preserved family identity as c_4_family property/coordinate metadata, not family node labels. Registered five reviewed prime/inversion corpus properties in S2 schema. Added live ignored Neo4j integrity test covering branch provenance, duplicate/null coordinates, raw bimbaCoordinate properties, imported relation endpoint properties, unregistered imported properties, and relationship type drift. Verification: cargo test --offline --manifest-path Body/S/S2/graph-services/Cargo.toml dataset_import passed; cargo test --offline --manifest-path Body/S/S2/graph-services/Cargo.toml deep_bimba_regional_properties_are_registered_before_import passed; escalated EPILOGOS_DATASETS=... cargo run --manifest-path Body/S/S0/epi-cli/Cargo.toml -- graph import all succeeded against local Neo4j (15 branches imported; labels applied: 1865 labeled, 0 newly stubbed, 11 skipped; remaining relation skips are missing target endpoint source-data issues); escalated cargo test --offline --manifest-path Body/S/S2/graph-services/Cargo.toml --test dataset_import_live_contract -- --ignored passed; full cargo test --offline --manifest-path Body/S/S2/graph-services/Cargo.toml passed (71 unit + integration suites, 3 ignored unit/live tests). GitNexus impact attempted with npx gitnexus impact DatasetImporter but blocked by @ladybugdb/core native module architecture mismatch: have arm64, need x86_64.

Decision harness at Body/M/epi-tauri/decisions/{README.md, track-05-t0-runtime-baseline.json, adr-001-theia-runtime-mode.md, adr-002-single-vs-multi-webview.md, adr-003-bridge-ownership.md}. Inventory cross-references existing 06.T0 (renderer baseline), 07.T0 (extension contracts), 08.T0 (composition), 09.T0 (mediation) preflights — no duplication. Build topology captured: Tauri v2, Vite+React 19, Wry/WebKit, vitest+playwright, identifier com.epi-logos.desktop, 1520x960 transparent overlay window, devUrl 127.0.0.1:5173, plugins shell/dialog/fs/window-state, tokio+tokio-tungstenite. Three ADRs authored as Open (recommended defaults recorded): ADR-05-001 (PRD-01 Theia runtime mode -> browser-mode-in-webview first, supervised localhost fallback, Electron sidecar last resort), ADR-05-002 (PRD-02 single-vs-multi-webview -> multi-webview + tray/background for /body), ADR-05-003 (PRD-03 bridge ownership -> hybrid Tauri singleton + Theia-native KernelBridgeAPI adapter). Tranche dependency map (T1-T9): T1 can_start=true; T2 after ADRs; T3-T8 marked can_start=false with explicit upstream Track 01-04 blockers; T9 after T8. Local-dev topology names 9 services with explicit always_required gating per tranche, env vars (TAURI_DEV_HOST, EPILOGOS_NEO4J_URI, EPILOGOS_SEMANTIC_CACHE_REDIS_URL, EPI_GRAPH_LIVE). 7 blockers carried forward (PRD-01/02/03/04, DSD-02, spacetimedb-native-block, S5-persisted-stores). Verification: pnpm/npm vitest 17/17 + cargo 44/44 (verified at 06.T0; no source changes here).

Idea/Pratibimba/System Theia workspace scaffolded and BUILDING. Layout: theia-app/ (Theia browser app) + extensions/kernel-bridge-readiness/ (first non-placeholder contribution) + shared/ (composition contracts from 08.T0) + docs/ (extension-naming.md, dependency-model.md, publishing-model.md) + scripts/smoke-build.sh + pnpm-workspace.yaml + tsconfig.base.json + pnpm-lock.yaml + patches/. Theia pinned to 1.56.0 (latest stable, browser-mode, no Electron preset). kernel-bridge-readiness extension implements the 9-state readiness taxonomy from 07.T0, calls real epi gate /health endpoint via GatewayReadinessSource (no mock branch), renders a ReactWidget with severity-coded state + reason + profile generation + carried-forward blocker IDs + Refresh action. tsc -b compiles cleanly (extension lib/ output verified). theia build emits real 9.4MB browser bundle at theia-app/lib/frontend/bundle.js + index.html + extensions_kernel-bridge-readiness_*.js chunk + Theia fonts/assets — confirmed via grep that our extension chunk is part of the bundle. Two upstream patches committed to patches/@theia__application-manager@1.56.0.patch and pinned via pnpm.patchedDependencies: (a) spawn() quotes command so paths-with-spaces don't trigger /bin/sh word-splitting under shell:true; (b) resolveBin() walks up to find pnpm-hoisted bins instead of looking only in the package's local node_modules. @vscode/ripgrep pinned to 1.15.9 (newer versions removed bin/rg subpath from exports). scripts/smoke-build.sh runs pnpm install --frozen-lockfile + extension tsc + theia build + verifies bundle.js/index.html/our extension chunk presence — PASSES (9.4MB bundle). Known carry-forward: backend bundle (Node-side server) hits drivelist@9.2.4 module-not-found on Node 24 (drivelist is a native gyp module that doesn't build there); frontend bundle is unaffected so 05.T1's canonical 'real Theia browser bundle' deliverable is met. Pin Node 22 for backend startup OR add webpack alias stubbing drivelist (Track 05 T2 work). Also documented: keytar and node-pty native modules skipped via pnpm onlyBuiltDependencies — @theia/terminal and @theia/process removed from theia-app deps until upstream supports Node ≥22.

Pratibimba System Theia 1.56 app now has reproducible frozen pnpm install, full frontend/backend webpack build, real kernel-bridge readiness source test via loopback HTTP, clean smoke-build.sh with no tolerated backend failure, and live headless Chrome verification of Theia shell plus mounted readiness widget showing real bridge_unavailable gateway state. Verified: pnpm --dir Idea/Pratibimba/System test; bash Idea/Pratibimba/System/scripts/smoke-build.sh; pnpm --filter @pratibimba/theia-app start; headless Chrome DOM assertion for .theia-ApplicationShell, readiness tab/widget, and epi gate source.

Tauri composition prototype landed end-to-end, closing PRD-01 + PRD-02 + PRD-03 (the three ADRs left Open by 05.T0). ADR-05-001 amended Decision: Option 1 browser-mode-in-Wry via 'pratibimba://' custom URI scheme protocol. ADR-05-002 amended Decision: Option 2 multi-webview co-existence (separate WebviewWindow labelled pratibimba-ide, persists until dismissed). ADR-05-003 amended Decision (provisional): Option 3 hybrid Tauri singleton (AppState already exists) + Theia-native KernelBridgeAPI adapter (typed wiring lands with Track 01 T5). Files: Body/M/epi-tauri/src-tauri/src/commands/pratibimba.rs (summon/dismiss/status commands), Body/M/epi-tauri/src-tauri/src/lib.rs (registers register_uri_scheme_protocol('pratibimba', ...) handler, resolves Idea/Pratibimba/System/theia-app/lib/frontend/, MIME-types html/js/mjs/css/json/svg/png/jpg/woff/woff2/ttf/eot/map, rejects '..' traversal as 403, missing as 404; EPI_PRATIBIMBA_FRONTEND_DIR env override for tests), tauri.conf.json#csp extended with pratibimba: origin across default-src/img-src/style-src/script-src/worker-src/connect-src/font-src/child-src/frame-src (allows Workers, IndexedDB, gateway connect-src, blob: workers, AMD 'unsafe-eval'), Body/M/epi-tauri/src/services/pratibimbaClient.ts (typed summon/dismiss/status renderer client). Verification: cargo test src-tauri 49/49 (was 44, +5 new pratibimba_protocol tests: root→index.html, bundle.js correct MIME, path traversal 403, missing 404, full Theia MIME table); vitest 21/21 (+4 pratibimbaClient.test.ts: summon/dismiss/status invoke correct command, AppError surfacing); tsc --noEmit clean. Resource-use/CSP/IPC live-app measurements deferred to a desktop acceptance run; the protocol handler + command surface + CSP + client are all compile-and-test verified.

Inventory at Body/M/epi-tauri/contract-inventory/track-06-baseline.json: 12 frontend services classified (8 production_foothold, 1 compatibility_adapter [clockClient], 1 placeholder [epiiClient]; 2 mixed), 6 stores classified (5 production_foothold, 1 compatibility [clockStore]), 9 shell/panel/domain surfaces (3 production_foothold, 2 compatibility, 4 placeholder), Rust shell 62 tauri commands across 12 modules registered in lib.rs#invoke_handler, 6 vitest + 5 playwright e2e + 1 rust integration test surface inventoried, 7-entry migration ledger (PortalRuntimeState->lite bridge / PortalClockState->compat over profile+world_clock / GraphData->S2 filtered subgraph / AgentRunHandle->S5 run lineage / spacetime.rs stubs->native WS / OmniPanel placeholders->S5 alerts+deep-links / epiiClient->S5 epii-agent contract), 10 carried-forward blockers (PRD-03, IOD-03/04/10, UFV-01/03/04, 0-side composition seam, spacetimedb-native gated on Track 03 T3, deep-link receiver minimum). Verification PASS: npm run lint (tsc --noEmit clean), npm run test (vitest 17/17 across 6 files), cargo test src-tauri (41+3 = 44/44). E2E deferred per plan (requires dev server).

Soft-gated on Track 01 T5 (kernel-bridge contract package). 06.T1's primary deliverable is a kernelBridgeClient + kernelBridgeStore consuming 'the shared Track 01 TypeScript contract for lite mode', and the body explicitly forbids inventing a parallel hand-authored MathemeHarmonicProfile/readiness/bridge contract outside the boundary mirror. Track 01 T5 has not landed (depends on 01.T1-T4), so no contract exists to consume. Releasing 06.T1 back to ready/blocked until 01.T5 lands; foundational route is to do 01.T1 next which unblocks the chain.

Initial Track 07 T0 preflight package was corrected into Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/: contract inventory JSON + markdown, readiness requirements manifest, validator, and node:test coverage. Fresh verification passed after relocation: node Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/scripts/validate-extension-contract-preflight.mjs => {ok:true}; node --test Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/test/validate-extension-contract-preflight.test.mjs => 3/3 pass. Inventory defines all six extension packages, readiness taxonomy, command/route naming, bridge capability families, forbidden direct-import policy, Track 08 exports, and first-slice blockers. Blocked/degraded readiness states are now plain owner/payload requirements from upstream Track 01/02/03/04/10 integration lanes rather than fake sample data.

Corrected Track 07 T0 into the real Theia system tree at Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions; removed the false root-level Pratibimba System tree; updated Track 07 planner metadata/write scopes away from the root-level path and standardized the payload-missing readiness name as authority_payload_missing. Verification passed: node Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/scripts/validate-extension-contract-preflight.mjs => {ok:true}; node --test Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/test/validate-extension-contract-preflight.test.mjs => 3/3 pass. Package defines all six extension contracts, shared bridge/readiness policy, direct S-stack import rejection fixtures, Track 08 exports, and plain readiness requirements without fake payloads.

07.T1 landed Theia extension skeleton + shared m-extension-runtime adapter. Six packages (@pratibimba/{m0-anuttara,m1-paramasiva,m2-parashakti,m3-mahamaya,m4-nara,m5-epii}) generated from 07.T0 contract via scaffold-m-extensions.mjs, each registering primary view contribution, open/readOnly/depositOnly commands, epi-logos:// route handler command, and observability publisher gated by 07.T0 event-type list. Shared @pratibimba/m-extension-runtime owns single-fan-out SharedBridgeAdapter (KernelBridgeAPI consumer with late-subscriber cache), CoordinateContext model, MathemeHarmonicProfileBoundary, 9-state readiness taxonomy mirroring epi-cli/schemas, ReadinessBanner shared visual shell, and DI module binding SHARED_BRIDGE_ADAPTER as singleton. Verification: pnpm --filter ... build clean for runtime + all six (tsc); ./scripts/smoke-build.sh green (21.3MB bundle.js, all eight required extension chunks landed in theia-app/lib/frontend/); node --test extensions/test/shared-bridge-fan-out.test.mjs proves one upstream subscription fans out to six subscribers with identical profile generation; existing 07.T0/08.T0 contract test suite still passes (12/12); validate-extension-contract-preflight.mjs ok=true with tightened import-pattern matcher that skips node_modules and only flags forbidden fragments inside import/require statements. With bridge unattached, all six widgets render PENDING_M_READINESS = bridge_unavailable without crashing or fabricating data; live kernel-bridge runtime wiring deferred to 01.T5/T6.

Six Theia-native M-extension packages and shared m-extension-runtime adapter build in the Pratibimba Theia workspace. Fixed scaffold generator import drift, wired root test gate to run Track 07/08 contract tests, and verified SharedBridgeAdapter single upstream subscription fans out to six extension subscribers. Verification PASS: pnpm --dir Idea/Pratibimba/System build; pnpm --dir Idea/Pratibimba/System test; node Idea/Pratibimba/System/scripts/verify-m-extension-activation.mjs against live Theia server opened m0/m1/m2/m3/m4/m5 primary commands/views and confirmed bridge_unavailable readiness plus no fabricated MathemeHarmonicProfile data.

Added Track 08-facing contribution contracts for all six M extensions. Implemented shared runtime contribution-contract types, CROSS_EXTENSION_ROUTE_CONTRACTS, REQUIRED_OBSERVABILITY_PAYLOAD_FIELDS, createMExtensionContributionRuntime, and validateContributionEvent. Regenerated each M extension common export with TRACK_08_CONTRIBUTION covering compact views, selection handlers, current-state selectors, evidence serializers, mini modes, per-extension route contracts, observability event contracts, and explicit Track 07/Track 08 composition boundary. Added contracts/07-t2-track08-contribution-contracts.md. Added track-08-contribution-contract.test.mjs proving Track 08 imports only package-root public contracts, route chain M0->M1->M2->M3->M4->M5 is encoded, events require sourceExtension/coordinateContext/profileGeneration/privacyClass/evidenceHandles/provenanceHandles, and stand-alone/composition runtimes read one SharedBridgeAdapter instance. Verification: pnpm --dir Idea/Pratibimba/System build passed; pnpm --dir Idea/Pratibimba/System test:contracts passed 16 tests; pnpm --dir Idea/Pratibimba/System test passed under escalation for the real localhost readiness verifier.

Composition preflight at Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/contracts/08-t0-composition-contract-preflight.{json,md}: VAK baseline CF=(0/1/2) CFP0 CT4b, both integrated plugins (plugin-integrated-1-2-3 [m1+m2+m3], plugin-integrated-4-5-0 [m4+m5+m0]) declared with contributors, 6 composition contract shapes (IntegratedSurfaceContribution, IntegratedViewPart, IntegratedMiniInspector, IntegratedEvidenceProducer, IntegratedLayoutClaim, IntegratedReadiness) with required_fields, readiness taxonomy inherits 07.T0's 9 states (no divergence), fixture payload requirements per upstream track (S0 from 01.T0 baseline-profile.json, S2 from 02.T0 schema/registry, S3 blocked on Track 03 T3, S4 from 09.T0 epii-agent contract+ledger, S5 blocked on Track 04 T6-T7), compatibility matrix per plugin marking Track 07 internals out_of_scope_for_08=true, 6 shared rules inheriting 07.T0's KernelBridgeAPI + forbidden-import set, 10 open decisions + 8 readiness blockers (track-08.activation-mode/mini-mode-contract/composition-ownership/live-state-cadence/visual-language/personal-field/S2-GDS-personalization/alpha-section-drift + PRD-03 + IOD-07 + DCC-01 + DSD-03 + track-07.dependency). Validator at Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/test/validate-composition-contract-preflight.test.mjs: 7/7 pass; sibling 07.T0 validator still 3/3 green.

08.T1 landed integrated plugin packages + composition arbitration skeleton. New @pratibimba/integrated-composition shared package owns CompositionCoordinator (singleton-slot arbitration with named-layout preference, mini-mode downgrade for named mini-inspector owners, blocked-conflict for equal-priority non-named claims), IntegratedReadinessAggregate (degrades to worst contributor severity), IntegratedNamedLayout descriptors COSMIC_ENGINE_LAYOUT + JIVA_SIVA_LAYOUT, IntegratedBridgeGate (starts detached; flips on connected/non-detached status — gates command + layout install per 08.T1 verification 1), IntegratedEmptyState view that lists missing contributors + blocking readiness with ownerTrack/blockerId/humanReason and never fabricates demo data (verification 3), enforceProtectedLocalBoundary() that blocks M4 raw-body selectors from the 4/5/0 composition per 08.T0 sharedRules, and the five named commands epi.integrated.{openCosmicEngine,openJivaSiva,toggleMiniInspectors,openEvidencePanel,copyEvidenceHandle}. New @pratibimba/plugin-integrated-1-2-3 and @pratibimba/plugin-integrated-4-5-0 packages register the five commands behind the bridge gate (commands short-circuit to no-op while !installed), bind the named layout via NAMED_LAYOUTS, and render the IntegratedEmptyState as their primary view. Both plugins generated from 08.T0 manifest via scaffold-integrated-plugins.mjs for idempotent regeneration. Verification: ./scripts/smoke-build.sh green (bundle 21.32MB, all 11 required chunks present including extensions_integrated-composition_*, extensions_plugin-integrated-1-2-3_*, extensions_plugin-integrated-4-5-0_*); node --test extensions/test/*.test.mjs 31/31 pass including 10 new arbitration tests covering named-owner-wins, equal-priority-conflict, mini-inspector inhibition for non-named owners, readiness aggregate degradation, M4 protected-local violation detection on jiva-siva, no-op on cosmic-engine, empty-state owner-track mapping, bridge gate detached-by-default, exact command set, and named-layout descriptors; validator ok=true (no forbidden imports in any new package). Open decisions deferred to later tranches: track-08.activation-mode (named layouts implemented as descriptors not as Theia workspace layouts yet — gated by Theia LayoutService wiring in T2), track-08.mini-mode-contract (mini-mode types defined; concrete mount-point inhibition flow in T2), track-08.composition-ownership (resolved by placing coordinator in extensions/integrated-composition/ following the worker's 07.T2 precedent rather than under a new shared/ workspace).

Implemented/verified Track 08 T1 integrated plugin skeleton: @pratibimba/integrated-composition package with command constants, named layouts, CompositionCoordinator layout arbitration, bridge-gated activation helper, and degraded empty-state contract; generated @pratibimba/plugin-integrated-1-2-3 and @pratibimba/plugin-integrated-4-5-0 packages with Theia frontend modules, primary widgets, workspace layout identifiers, and guarded integrated commands. Added extensions/test/track-08-integrated-layout-contract.test.mjs and wired it into test:contracts; it verifies package-root exports, command IDs, named layouts, overlap-to-mini-mode arbitration, equal-priority conflict blocking, missing-contributor degraded empty states without demo/placeholder payloads, and kernel-bridge gate activation. Verification: pnpm --dir Idea/Pratibimba/System build passed (Theia build compiled successfully; known optional @theia/electron resolution warning plus transient local package resolution warnings); pnpm --dir Idea/Pratibimba/System test:contracts passed 21/21; pnpm --dir Idea/Pratibimba/System test passed with escalation because sandbox blocks localhost listen for the real kernel-bridge readiness verifier.

08.T2 landed IntegratedStateCoordinator + cadence/staleness model on top of 08.T1 composition skeleton. integrated-composition gains: IntegratedViewState (frozen snapshot tracking profileGeneration + worldClockGeneration as separate ordered streams, selectedCoordinate, activeRoute, connection, bridgeReadiness, per-track s2/s3/s5 readiness, privacyScope, lastUpdatedAt), PENDING_INTEGRATED_VIEW_STATE constant, computeStaleness() helper that produces immutable StalenessMeta from (view, displayedProfileGen, displayedWorldClockGen) — renderers compute their own staleness against the authoritative immutable view and never mutate it, INTEGRATED_OBSERVABILITY_KINDS exhaustive enum of the 6 event families (activation, readiness-transition, layout-conflict, privacy-blocked-projection, evidence-envelope-created, capability-invocation-rejected), and IntegratedStateCoordinator class. Coordinator subscribes ONCE to SharedBridgeAdapter (inheriting 07.T1's single-fan-out guarantee), exposes onViewState() with late-subscriber replay, advanceWorldClock(), setActiveRoute(), and publish() that throws on undeclared event kinds. Disconnect cycle clears profileGeneration + worldClockGeneration to null and emits integrated.readiness-transition; reconnect with a new generation flows through cleanly without stale claims. Verification: ./scripts/smoke-build.sh green (bundle 21.32MB, all 11 chunks); node --test extensions/test/*.test.mjs 37/37 pass including 6 new state coordinator tests covering (a) single upstream subscription per raw-bridge channel with adapter.getUpstreamSubscriptionCount()===1, (b) late subscribers receive current view with computed staleness, (c) disconnect-reconnect-resync drives view through degraded states without stale profile/worldclock fields, (d) publish enforces declared 6-kind set and rejects fabricated kinds, (e) view-state snapshots are Object.frozen so renderer-local cadence cannot mutate authoritative fields, (f) readiness state-specific mapping isolates s2/s3/s5 blocks to the named track. Validator ok=true. Open decisions still deferred: track-08.activation-mode (workspace-layout install still gated on Theia LayoutService binding — coordinator owns the active route value but production wiring waits on 08.T3+), track-08.live-state-cadence (coordinator carries the two generations and StalenessMeta primitives needed by future cadence policy — renderer-side interpolation timer choice deferred).

08.T3 landed the 1-2-3 Cosmic Engine composition slice. New profile-field-checker module exports checkCosmicEnginePanes() which produces an immutable PaneAvailability snapshot for each of the three panes (m3-center-stage, m2-left-stage, m1-right-inspector) carrying profileGeneration + per-field availability + named blocker owner track per missing field — fields scanned: M3 codon_rotation_projection/mahamaya/codec_lut, M2 resonance72/planetaryChakral/kleinFlipState, M1 lens/mode/audio_octet/nodal_quartet. COSMIC_ENGINE_LAYOUT updated to match the 08.T3 plan body (M3 cosmic wheel center, M2 lens/cymatic backdrop providing evidence, M1 torus/path/audio-walk inspector side) — previous 08.T1 placeholder ownership corrected; M1/M2/M3 all listed as mini-inspector owners for the choreography rule. New CosmicEnginePanes React component renders the three panes from one shared MathemeHarmonicProfileBoundary — every value is read directly from profile.payload via readPayloadString helper, no local codon/tarot/planetary/pitch/correspondence tables anywhere in the package (enforced by static scanner test). PluginIntegrated123Widget extended to subscribe to bridge.onProfile, branch on contributor+profile availability, render CosmicEnginePanes when ready and IntegratedEmptyState otherwise. Scaffolder updated to preserve hand-extended widget. Grid CSS for cosmic-engine-layout (m2-left | m3-center | m1-right) + per-pane shells. Verification: ./scripts/smoke-build.sh green (bundle 21.32MB, all 11 chunks present); node --test extensions/test/*.test.mjs 44/44 pass including 7 new cosmic engine slice tests: (a) single profile generation drives identical generation ids across all three panes; (b) missing M3 codec LUT degrades only M3 pane with named Track 02 owner; (c) missing M1 audio_octet degrades only M1 pane; (d) null profile produces all-panes-missing with generation null; (e) pane field groups match layout owner extensions; (f) static scan of plugin-integrated-1-2-3/src rejects 4 forbidden literal patterns (long numeric arrays, dense object maps, codon/tarot/planet/pitch/chakra keyword + array literal, named *Table identifiers); (g) every field has a non-empty blocker owner track. 10 existing 08.T1 arbitration tests still pass after layout update. Validator ok=true. Open decisions still deferred: track-08.activation-mode (Theia LayoutService binding still uses widget area:main; named workspace layout install awaits T4+), live-state-cadence (StalenessMeta primitives ready but renderer-side world_clock interpolation timer awaits Track 03 T3 native deltas).

08.T4 landed 1-2-3 evidence/review/agent hooks on top of 08.T3 cosmic engine slice. New evidence-envelope.ts: IntegratedEvidenceEnvelope type carries envelopeId/producerId/rangeId/pluginId/profileGeneration/worldClockGeneration/s2ProvenanceHandles/s3SessionHandle/s3DayNowHandle/s5ReviewTarget/privacyClass/sourceSpecAnchors/requiresHumanFinalValidation/payload (08.T4 deliverable 4 — every cross-track field present). DEFAULT_REVIEW_TARGETS maps each producer to a typed s5.review.target.{canon,identity,model,routine,gap}. New evidence-producers.ts: five pure producers (cosmic-engine-snapshot, route-codon-projection-audit, m2-meaning-packet-trace, kernel-trace-handle, readiness-gap-report) each refuse to emit when required upstream fields are missing unless forceEmitOnGap=true. Each envelope sources s2 provenance from profile.payload.s2_provenance.handles and cites concrete source-spec anchor paths (M3/M2 specs + plan tranches). New s5-review-actions.ts: three action wrappers (openInReview, askEpiiToExplain, createImprovementCandidate) routed through bridge.invokeGatewayRpc with method names s5.review.request/s5.epii.explain.request/s5.improve.deposit and full envelope-payload mapping; return typed S5ActionResult with status one of submitted/s5_review_blocked/bridge_unavailable/human_validation_required/rejected_by_gateway — no silent success branch. New privacy-scrubber.ts: validateEvidenceEnvelopeForRange rejects M4 protected-local privacy class on any 1-2-3 envelope, rejects forbidden field patterns (q_personal, q_nara, bioquaternion_*, nara_journal/body/raw/private, graphiti_body/content/raw/episode_body, m4_protected/private/body/raw, personal_field_body/raw), rejects forbidden value markers (<protected:body>, <protected:journal>, <bioquaternion:raw:). 4/5/0 envelopes have a more relaxed but still non-trivial forbidden set (raw bioquaternion only, never opaque handles). Plugin-integrated-1-2-3 cosmic-engine-panes adds per-pane Open-in-Review button wired to producer ids (M3 → route-codon-projection-audit, M2 → m2-meaning-packet-trace, M1 → kernel-trace-handle); widget handleOpenInReview pipeline produces envelope → validates via scrubber → calls openInReview with optional liveBridge. Verification: ./scripts/smoke-build.sh green (bundle 21.32MB, all 11 chunks); node --test extensions/test/*.test.mjs 55/55 pass including 11 new evidence+action+privacy tests covering (a) every producer emits a frozen envelope with required cross-track fields including S2 provenance, (b) producer refuses to emit cosmic-engine snapshot when M3 field missing, (c) readiness-gap-report emits on missing fields, (d) scrubber rejects M4 protected privacy class, (e) scrubber rejects bioquaternion_raw payload, (f) scrubber rejects nested Graphiti journal entries, (g) scrubber rejects <protected:body> marker strings in arbitrary text, (h) openInReview returns bridge_unavailable when no bridge, (i) returns s5_review_blocked when gateway throws, (j) all three actions short-circuit on requiresHumanFinalValidation envelopes without calling gateway, (k) non-human-gated envelopes pass through to correct gateway method names. Validator ok=true. Deferred: real Track 04 DTOs (gateway calls compile against typed boundary; payload shape ready for real s5.review.* methods when Track 04 lands); observability event emission via integrated coordinator publish() (event-kind enum already declared in 08.T2, wiring producer → publish deferred to T5/T6 where shared cadence coordinator is plumbed).

08.T5 landed 4/5/0 Jiva-Siva privacy-first composition slice. New consent-gate.ts: ConsentRecord type + ConsentGate class enforcing per-action consent state with five named ConsentActions (publish-shared-archetype, open-graphiti-body, open-identity-quaternion, open-nara-dialogue, open-m4-field-deep), require() throws ConsentMissingError when no record on file and ConsentExpiredError when expiresAt has passed, isPermitted() non-throwing variant for UI gating, revoke() for explicit consent withdrawal. New jiva-siva-fields.ts: checkJivaSivaPanes maps the three pane availability snapshots (m4-field-foreground, m0-graph-backdrop, m5-review-side) over 9 public-safe field names — bedrock_link/selected_coordinate/activity_resonance_dots/field_state_summary (M4 handles only), gds_clusters/m0_coordinate_provenance (M0 graph), review_queue_count/continuity_handle/last_canon_recognition_event (M5 metadata) — each field annotated with Track 02/03/04 owner; raw body / quaternion / journal names explicitly absent from the public-safe set (enforced by self-test). New jiva-siva-panes.tsx: React panes for the three roles, deep-action buttons rendered per pane but disabled until ConsentGate.isPermitted(action) returns true, no raw bodies anywhere. New widget integration: PluginIntegrated450Widget subscribes to profile updates, renders JivaSivaPanes when contributors+profile ready, holds a ConsentGate that mediates handleDeepOpen(action); when consent is missing the gate throws and the button stays disabled. Privacy-scrubber.ts already had range-aware enforcement from 08.T4 — verified that 4/5/0 envelopes correctly accept opaque protected handles (graphiti_handle, review_target_handle) while rejecting bioquaternion_raw / nara_raw / graphiti_body. Scaffolder updated to also preserve plugin-integrated-4-5-0/widget+style across regenerations. Grid CSS for jiva-siva-layout (m0-backdrop | m4-foreground | m5-side) with disabled deep-action buttons styled. Verification: ./scripts/smoke-build.sh green (bundle 21.32MB, all 11 chunks); node --test extensions/test/*.test.mjs 66/66 pass including 11 new jiva-siva tests covering: (a) all 9 public-safe field names contain no body/raw/journal/q_personal/q_nara/bioquaternion substrings; (b) three panes share one profile generation; (c) missing GDS overlay marks M0 blocked without fabricating clusters; (d) layout names M4 center, M5 side, M0/M5 mini-inspector, audioBusOwner=null; (e) ConsentGate.require throws ConsentMissingError when empty; (f) ConsentGate.require throws ConsentExpiredError past expiresAt; (g) accepts unexpired record and rejects after revoke; (h) consent action enum matches DEEP_ACTIONS exhaustively; (i) 4/5/0 envelope with bioquaternion_raw fails scrubber; (j) 4/5/0 envelope with opaque handles passes scrubber; (k) plugin source no-local-tables scan rejects q_personal/q_nara/bioquaternion literal arrays and named *Table identifiers. Validator ok=true. Deferred: real Track 04 consent service plumbing (gate compiles against typed record boundary; S5 consent service hookup awaits Track 04 T6+), actual deep-open routines after consent acceptance (currently logs and returns — real Graphiti/identity/Nara dialogue reads await Track 04 + Track 03 Graphiti service).

rationale: Simulated each selected task as done before choosing the next task, so downstream dependencies can enter the route.
Capped the route at 4 task(s) with total effort weight 8/8 unless fewer tasks were available.
